commands.repair_reason: Maintainers need to decide the authoritative OpenClaw identity boundary and trustedPublisher compatibility policy before this can be safely repaired or merged.; Needs attention: The diff changes a trust boundary and currently grants Official status from the openclaw handle without authoritative ownership proof.; Review finding: [P1] Require ownership proof before granting Official — convex/lib/officialPublishers.ts:... (sha=dbcd18a7903efdcf8e1ab0edd25b66951b56e802)
commands.review_summary:
The branch derives Official publisher/package status from hard-coded OpenClaw publisher membership and updates package channel policy, badge UI, docs, specs, and tests.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings: source inspection at the PR head shows `isOfficialPublisher` grants org Official status from the `openclaw` handle alone, and `SkillHeader` consumes `owner.official` while `skills.getBySlug` still returns a plain public publisher.
commands.review_followup: Maintainers need to decide the authoritative OpenClaw identity boundary and trustedPublisher compatibility policy before this can be safely repaired or merged.

target.title: Add hard-coded OpenClaw official publishers
target.body:
Summary
- Derive Official publisher status from the hard-coded `openclaw` org: the `openclaw` org publisher is Official, and current `openclaw` org members' personal publishers are Official while membership exists.
- Keep package publishing/channel decisions tied to that policy; `trustedPublisher` remains only an automated publish permission.
- Remove the overbuilt persisted Official state/sync/backfill path: no `publishers.official`, no skill badge source metadata, no official skill digest index, and no generic endpoint for arbitrary Official publishers.
- Render the blue Official badge in publisher/profile, skill, and plugin UI where the existing public data supports it.
- Document the narrowed policy.

Visual proof
Captured locally with `origin/main` on `localhost:3101` and this PR on `localhost:3100`.

| Surface | Mode | Before | After |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Plugin detail, `/plugins/@openclaw/codex` | Dark | <!-- upload before-dark.png here --> | <!-- upload after-dark.png here --> |
| Plugin detail, `/plugins/@openclaw/codex` | Light | <!-- upload before-light.png here --> | <!-- upload after-light.png here --> |
| Member profile with OpenClaw org affiliation, `/user/steipete` | Dark | <!-- upload profile-steipete-before-dark.png here --> | <!-- upload profile-steipete-after-dark.png here --> |
| Member profile with OpenClaw org affiliation, `/user/steipete` | Light | n/a | <!-- upload profile-steipete-after-light.png here --> |
| OpenClaw org profile with member/published-item badges, `/user/openclaw` | Dark | n/a | <!-- upload profile-openclaw-after-dark.png here --> |
| OpenClaw org profile with member/published-item badges, `/user/openclaw` | Light | n/a | <!-- upload profile-openclaw-after-light.png here --> |
| Skill detail title badge, `/openclaw/official-agent-toolkit` | Dark | <!-- upload skill-detail-before-dark.png here --> | <!-- upload skill-detail-after-dark.png here --> |
| Skill detail title badge, `/openclaw/official-agent-toolkit` | Light | n/a | <!-- upload skill-detail-after-light.png here --> |
| Skill card tag row, `/skills?q=official-agent-toolkit&view=grid` | Dark | <!-- upload skill-card-tags-before-dark.png here --> | <!-- upload skill-card-tags-after-dark.png here --> |
| Skill card tag row, `/skills?q=official-agent-toolkit&view=grid` | Light | n/a | <!-- upload skill-card-tags-after-light.png here --> |
| Runtime plugin detail, `/plugins/@openclaw/runtime-tools` | Dark | <!-- upload plugin-runtime-before-dark.png here --> | <!-- upload plugin-runtime-after-dark.png here --> |
| Runtime plugin detail, `/plugins/@openclaw/runtime-tools` | Light | n/a | <!-- upload plugin-runtime-after-light.png here --> |

DOM check from the same run:
- `/plugins/@openclaw/codex`: before dark/light `Official` badge count `0`; after dark/light `Official` badge count `1`.
- `/user/steipete`: before dark `Official` badge count `0`; after dark/light `Official` badge count `3`.
- `/user/openclaw`: after dark/light `Official` badge count `6`.
- `/openclaw/official-agent-toolkit`: before dark `Official` badge count `0` and `Verified` text count `1`; after dark/light `Official` badge count `1` and `Verified` text count `0`.
- `/skills?q=official-agent-toolkit&view=grid`: before dark `Official` badge count `0` and `Verified` text count `1`; after dark/light `Official` badge count `1` and `Verified` text count `0`.
- `/plugins/@openclaw/runtime-tools`: before dark `Official` badge count `0`; after dark/light `Official` badge count `1`.
- The only recurring console error in the screenshot run was the same dev-only theme hydration warning.

Prod data check
- Active Official packages in prod: `32`.
- Official packages outside hard-coded OpenClaw ownership: `0`.
- Trusted publishers/users outside hard-coded OpenClaw ownership: `0`.
- One non-OpenClaw skill-level Official badge exists (`x-search` by `Jaaneek`), and this PR preserves skill-level Official badges.

Verification
- `bun run test`
- `bun run test convex/lib/officialPublishers.test.ts convex/lib/public.test.ts convex/packages.public.test.ts convex/publishers.test.ts`
- `bun run test src/components/SkillHeader.test.tsx src/components/PublisherListItem.test.tsx src/components/PluginListItem.test.tsx src/components/SkillListItem.test.tsx src/components/UserBadge.test.tsx src/components/PublishedItemCard.test.tsx src/components/SkillCard.test.tsx src/__tests__/packages-route.test.tsx src/__tests__/package-detail-route.test.tsx`
- `bun run format:check`
- `bun run lint`
- `VITE_CONVEX_URL=https://example.invalid bunx tsc --noEmit`
- `bunx tsc -p packages/schema/tsconfig.json --noEmit`
- `bunx tsc -p packages/clawhub/tsconfig.json --noEmit`
